feat.name: Tight Follower
feat.text: You keep up as a protector. Stride up to your Speed closer to your designated ally. Your movement must end within 10 feet of your designated ally.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.

feat.trigger: Your designated ally moves and ends that movement more than 10 feet from you.
